_comment: Curated role personas: each maps to a skill loadout + the matching Workflow Recipe + subagent. Canonical source for the playground onboarding chips (web/app.js) and PERSONAS.md. Keep skill names in sync with skills.json.

personas.name: Product Manager
personas.useWhen: You own a product area — discovery to launch.

personas.name: Founder / Exec
personas.useWhen: You set direction and answer to a board.

personas.name: Engineering Lead
personas.useWhen: You own architecture, delivery, and on-call.

personas.name: AI/ML Engineer
personas.useWhen: You're shipping an AI/LLM feature responsibly.

personas.name: Customer Success
personas.useWhen: You own retention, renewals, and escalations.

personas.name: Growth / Marketing
personas.useWhen: You own acquisition, activation, and retention loops.

personas.name: Compliance / Security Lead
personas.useWhen: You own trust, audits, and regulated data.

personas.name: Designer
personas.useWhen: You own the experience, from flows to handoff.
